infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Faturimi needs camera access so you can take a photo of a document to auto-fill your company profile with AI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Faturimi needs photo library access so you can pick a photo of a document to auto-fill your company profile with AI.

plugins.cameraPermission: Faturimi needs camera access so you can take a photo of a document to auto-fill your company profile with AI.
plugins.photosPermission: Faturimi needs photo library access so you can pick a photo of a document to auto-fill your company profile with AI.
